description_long: This cabinetry ensemble features a modern L-shaped kitchen layout with a combination of tall pantry cabinets, base cabinets, and wall-mounted units. The cabinetry is predominantly white with sleek, flat-panel doors and drawers, complemented by a light wood countertop that runs along the length of the base units. Integrated appliances, such as a refrigerator and oven, are built into the tall cabinet section, while a black range hood is mounted above the cooktop area. The wall cabinets provide additional storage and are mounted above the countertop, offering a clean, minimalist appearance. The handles are subtle, likely bar pulls, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The cabinetry is set on a wood-textured floor panel, suggesting its placement in a kitchen or kitchenette area.
description: A modern L-shaped kitchen cabinetry set with white flat-panel doors, wood countertops, and integrated appliances, featuring both tall and wall-mounted storage units.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shaped layout, with tall pantry, base cabinets, wall cabinets, and integrated appliances clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the tall pantry cabinet and the arrangement of the base cabinets along the wood countertop.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the tall pantry cabinet and the back of the wall-mounted units, with the range hood and cooktop area visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side profile of the tall pantry and the end of the base cabinets, with appliance integration evident.
attribute_cabinet_type: L-shaped kitchen suite (base cabinet, wall cabinet, tall pantry cabinet)
attribute_door_configuration: combination of single door, double door, and drawers
